title: draco
intro: Draco is a type of plant, specifically Dracocephalum moldavica, commonly known as dragon plant or dragon's head, which belongs to the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of draco plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and soothing digestive problems. Draco plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used fresh or dried for topical applications.
